# alfiDzn
> Free After Effects project files, presets, and tutorials by Alfi — a motion designer from Indonesia.

## About
alfiDzn is a free resource hub for motion designers. All assets are compatible with Adobe After Effects and available for free download.

## Catalog
- /catalog: Browse all After Effects project files and presets

## Tutorials
- /tutorials: Step-by-step After Effects tutorials

## Contact
- Creator: Alfi (motion designer, Indonesia)
